title: GitHub confirms breach of 3,800 repos via malicious VSCode extension
summary:
**Summary:**  
GitHub confirmed that approximately 3,800 internal repositories were breached after an employee installed a malicious VS Code extension. The trojanized extension was removed from the VS Code Marketplace, and the compromised device was secured. The breach involved exfiltration of GitHub-internal repositories only; no customer data outside those repos was affected, according to GitHub.  

The hacker group TeamPCP claimed responsibility on the Breached cybercrime forum, offering the stolen data for at least $50,000 and threatening to leak it if no buyer is found. TeamPCP has previously been linked to supply chain attacks on platforms like GitHub, PyPI, NPM, and Docker, as well as the "Mini Shai-Hulud" campaign targeting OpenAI employees.  

This incident follows a pattern of malicious VS Code extensions on the Marketplace, including those used to steal credentials, deploy cryptominers, and exfiltrate data. GitHub’s platform serves over 180 million developers and 4 million organizations.
chinese_title: GitHub确认通过恶意VSCode扩展入侵3800个仓库
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**  
GitHub证实，一名员工安装了恶意VS Code扩展程序后，约3800个内部代码库遭到入侵。该木马化扩展已从VS Code市场下架，受感染设备也已得到保护。GitHub表示，此次泄露仅涉及GitHub内部代码库，其他客户数据未受影响。  

黑客组织TeamPCP在犯罪论坛Breached上宣称对此负责，并索要至少5万美元出售被盗数据，威胁若无人购买将予以公开。该组织此前曾参与针对GitHub、PyPI、NPM、Docker等平台的供应链攻击，以及针对OpenAI员工的“Mini Shai-Hulud”行动。  

这起事件延续了市场上恶意VS Code扩展的模式，包括用于窃取凭证、部署挖矿程序和窃取数据的扩展。GitHub平台服务超过1.8亿开发者和400万组织。

title: How fast is N tokens per second really?
summary:
This article presents an interactive tool designed to help users **internalize what different LLM token-per-second (tok/s) speeds actually feel like** when reading generated output. The core argument is that benchmark numbers like “47 tok/s” or “180 tok/s” are abstract and hard to visualize without seeing them stream.

The tool offers **four content modes** to show how the same speed feels different depending on what is being generated:
- **Code** (syntax-highlighted),
- **Text** (prose),
- **Think** (reasoning + code),
- **Agent** (tool calls + code with pauses).

Users can adjust speeds via a scale: **1 (5 tok/s)** mimics a slow Raspberry Pi model, **5 (60 tok/s)** is typical for hosted GPT/Claude, **7 (200 tok/s)** approaches Groq speeds, and **9 (800 tok/s)** represents Cerebras-level speed where reading becomes the bottleneck.

Key points:
- **Tokenization** approximates BPE-style, not vendor-specific encoders. Short words are often one token; longer identifiers split.
- **Code is more token-dense** than prose, so the same tok/s can feel slower or faster depending on content type.
- **English prose** averages ~1.3 tokens per word, so 30 tok/s ≈ 23 words/s.
- The tool’s purpose is to expose the gap between raw benchmark numbers and the **perceptual experience** of reading different types of LLM output at various speeds.
chinese_title: N tokens per second到底有多快？
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了一款交互式工具，旨在帮助用户**具体感知不同大语言模型每秒生成令牌数（tok/s）速度在阅读输出内容时的实际体验**。其核心观点在于，“47 tok/s”或“180 tok/s”这类基准数值过于抽象，不通过实时流式展示便难以直观理解。

该工具提供**四种内容模式**，展示相同速度因生成内容不同而带来的差异感受：
- **代码**（语法高亮），
- **文本**（散文），
- **思考**（推理过程+代码），
- **智能体**（工具调用+包含停顿的代码）。

用户可通过滑块调整速度：**1（5 tok/s）** 模拟慢速树莓派模型运行，**5（60 tok/s）** 为托管GPT/Claude的典型速度，**7（200 tok/s）** 接近Groq速度，**9（800 tok/s）** 代表Cerebras级别速度——此时阅读成为瓶颈。

关键要点：
- **分词**采用近似BPE风格，而非特定厂商编码。短单词常为单个令牌；较长标识符会拆分。
- **代码的令牌密度高于散文**，因此相同tok/s速度下，内容类型不同会导致感知速度产生快慢差异。
- **英文散文**平均每词约1.3个令牌，故30 tok/s≈23词/秒。
- 该工具旨在揭示原始基准数值与**不同速度下阅读各类大模型输出内容的感知体验**之间的落差。

title: Flipper One Tech Specs
summary:
The article details the technical specifications of the Flipper One, a device under active development. Key specs include:

- **Size & Build**: 155 x 67 x 40 mm, weight TBD. Body is PC/ABS with an anodized aluminum heatsink, bracket, and lanyard loop, plus TPU bumpers and Gorilla Glass screen.
- **Display**: 256×144 pixel monochrome LCD with 64 grayscale levels, driven by the MCU via QSPI.
- **Ports**: Includes USB-C (with DP alt mode and PD), USB-A, full-size HDMI 2.1 (4K@120Hz), dual Gigabit Ethernet, 3.5mm audio jack, microSD, and nano SIM slot.
- **Controls**: Touchpad with haptic feedback, 5 app buttons, power button, D-pad, back button, app switcher, and a PTT button.
- **Processing**: Main CPU is Rockchip RK3576 (4x Cortex-A72 + 4x Cortex-A53, up to 2.2 GHz) with Mali-G52 GPU and 6 TOPS NPU. Low-power MCU is Raspberry Pi RP2350B.
- **Memory & Storage**: 8 GB LPDDR5 RAM, 64 GB UFS 2.2 internal storage.
- **Battery**: 24000 mWh (7000 mAh, not final) with TI charger and fuel gauge, charging via USB-C PD up to 26V.
- **Connectivity**: Wi-Fi 6 (2.4/5/6 GHz) and Bluetooth 5.2 via Mediatek MT7921, plus dual Gigabit Ethernet.
- **Expansion**: M.2 Key B port (supports PCIe, USB, SATA, SIM) and a GPIO header with multiple CPU/MCU pins.
- **Debug**: Separate debug port with SWD and UART for MCU and CPU.

The device runs Linux on the CPU and custom MCU firmware, with a detailed M.2 and GPIO pinout provided.
chinese_title: Flipper One 技术规格
chinese_summary:
文章详细介绍了正在积极开发的Flipper One设备的技术规格。主要参数包括：

- **尺寸与构造**：155 x 67 x 40毫米，重量待定。机身采用PC/ABS材质，搭配阳极氧化铝散热片、支架和挂绳孔，以及TPU缓冲垫和康宁大猩猩玻璃屏幕。
- **显示屏**：256×144像素单色LCD，支持64级灰度，通过QSPI由微控制器驱动。
- **接口**：包括USB-C（支持DP Alt模式和PD）、USB-A、标准HDMI 2.1（4K@120Hz）、双千兆以太网、3.5毫米音频插孔、microSD卡槽和nano SIM卡槽。
- **控制**：配备触觉反馈触控板、5个应用按钮、电源键、方向键、返回键、应用切换键及PTT按键。
- **处理核心**：主CPU为瑞芯微RK3576（4×Cortex-A72 + 4×Cortex-A53，最高2.2 GHz），集成Mali-G52 GPU和6 TOPS NPU。低功耗微控制器为树莓派RP2350B。
- **内存与存储**：8 GB LPDDR5 RAM，64 GB UFS 2.2内部存储。
- **电池**：24000毫瓦时（7000毫安时，非最终规格），采用TI充电芯片和电量计，可通过USB-C PD最高支持26V充电。
- **连接性**：通过联发科MT7921支持Wi-Fi 6（2.4/5/6 GHz）和蓝牙5.2，另配双千兆以太网。
- **扩展**：M.2 Key B接口（支持PCIe、USB、SATA、SIM）及包含多个CPU/MCU引脚的GPIO排针。
- **调试**：独立调试接口，支持MCU和CPU的SWD与UART协议。

该设备在CPU上运行Linux系统，并配备定制MCU固件，附有详细的M.2和GPIO引脚定义说明。

title: Qwen3.7-Max: The Agent Frontier
summary:
**Summary of "Qwen3.7-Max: The Agent Frontier"**

The article introduces Qwen3.7-Max, Alibaba’s latest large language model positioned at the forefront of AI agent capabilities. It highlights two key features: extended reasoning and enhanced agentic autonomy.

**Extended Reasoning:** The model can think through complex problems step-by-step, with a "thinking budget" that allows it to take longer for difficult tasks. This improves accuracy on math, coding, and logic problems.

**Agentic Autonomy:** Qwen3.7-Max can autonomously use tools, browse the web, execute code, and interact with APIs to complete multi-step tasks without human intervention. This makes it ideal for real-world automation.

The model is designed to bridge the gap between advanced reasoning and practical action, aiming to be a "frontier" in agent-based AI. It represents a shift from simple chat to goal-oriented, self-directed AI systems capable of executing complex workflows.
chinese_title: Qwen3.7-Max：智能体前沿
chinese_summary:
**《Qwen3.7-Max：智能体前沿》摘要**

本文介绍了阿里巴巴最新的大型语言模型Qwen3.7-Max，该模型定位于AI智能体能力的前沿。文章重点突出了两大核心功能：扩展推理能力与增强的智能体自主性。

**扩展推理能力：**该模型能够逐步完成复杂问题的思考过程，通过"思考预算"机制为困难任务分配更多推理时间，从而在数学、编程和逻辑问题上提升准确性。

**智能体自主性：**Qwen3.7-Max可自主使用工具、浏览网页、执行代码并与API交互，无需人工干预即可完成多步骤任务，使其成为现实世界自动化场景的理想选择。

该模型旨在弥合高级推理与实际行动之间的差距，致力于成为基于智能体的AI领域的"前沿"之作。它标志着从简单对话向目标导向、自主决策型AI系统的转变，能够执行复杂工作流程。

title: Why is Inkwell stuck in review
summary:
**Summary:**  
Manton Reece describes the prolonged rejection of his iOS app "Inkwell," submitted on April 21, despite multiple fixes and an appeal. Key issues per Apple's guidelines:  

- **1.2**: Lacked reporting/blocking features and clear terms of service – added.  
- **2.1(a)**: Sign in with Apple button malfunctioned – fixed and hidden during cross-app sign-ins.  
- **2.1(b)**: Apple questioned revenue model – answered.  
- **3.1**: No in-app purchase for Micro.blog revenue; streamlined to qualify as a reader or companion app.  
- **4**: Design issues over Sign in with Apple prompting for name – disabled the feature.  
- **5.1.1(v)**: No in-app account deletion – added a delete button.  
- **5.2.5**: Trademark conflict – Apple’s own "Inkwell" trademark (dead since 2002) repeatedly cited, despite other apps using the name. Reece appealed but is frustrated by Apple’s power beyond legal merit.  

He remains undecided on rebranding but criticizes Apple’s control over app distribution.
chinese_title: 为什么Inkwell一直卡在审核中
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**  
Manton Reece 描述了其 iOS 应用 "Inkwell"（4月21日提交）在多次修复和申诉后仍遭长期拒绝的经历。苹果指南指出的关键问题包括：  

- **1.2**：缺少举报/屏蔽功能及明确服务条款——已补充。  
- **2.1(a)**：Apple登录按钮功能异常——已修复，并在跨应用登录时隐藏该功能。  
- **2.1(b)**：苹果质疑盈利模式——已做解释。  
- **3.1**：未针对Micro.blog收入设置应用内购买——已精简以符合阅读器或配套应用标准。  
- **4**：Apple登录时强制显示姓名的设计问题——已禁用该功能。  
- **5.1.1(v)**：缺少应用内账户删除功能——已添加删除按钮。  
- **5.2.5**：商标冲突——苹果自身已失效的 "Inkwell" 商标（自2002年失效）被反复引用，尽管其他应用已使用该名称。Reece 提起申诉，但对苹果超越法律依据的控制权感到失望。  

他尚未决定是否重新命名，但批评苹果对应用分发的绝对控制。

title: SBCL: the ultimate assembly code breadboard (2014)
summary:
This article describes a technique for optimizing stack-based virtual machines by mapping a small, fixed-size stack (8 slots) directly to CPU registers. The author, inspired by Chuck Moore's F18 and the x87 floating-point stack, implements a VM where push/pop operations simply adjust a modular pointer rather than moving data.

The key innovation is **primitive specialization**: each VM instruction has 8 variants, one for each possible stack pointer value. These variants are stored at regular intervals (every 4288 bytes) in memory, allowing efficient dispatch via a single `LEA` instruction that computes the target address by adding the stack pointer offset to the base address of the primitives.

The implementation uses SBCL's assembler to generate x86-64 machine code. The stack lives in registers R8-R15, with a modular counter tracking the current top. The `NEXT` instruction (which fetches the next VM instruction and jumps to it) encodes the dispatch: it reads a 32-bit offset from the bytecode, adds the base address and the variant offset, and jumps.

The article demonstrates primitives like `swap`, `dup`, `drop`, `add`, `sub`, and control flow (`jmp`, `call`, `ret`). It also includes FFI code (`enter`/`leave`) to call the VM from Common Lisp, copying values between a memory buffer and the register stack.

The result is tight machine code with minimal data movement and no cycle wasted on register shuffling, making it suitable for high-performance Forth-like systems.
chinese_title: SBCL：终极汇编代码试验板（2014）
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了一种通过将小型固定大小栈（8个槽位）直接映射到CPU寄存器来优化基于栈的虚拟机的技术。受查克·摩尔（Chuck Moore）的F18架构和x87浮点栈启发，作者实现了一个虚拟机，其中压栈/弹栈操作仅通过调整模块化指针而非移动数据。

核心创新在于**基元特化**：每个虚拟机指令拥有8种变体，分别对应每个可能的栈指针值。这些变体以固定间隔（每4288字节）存储在内存中，通过单个`LEA`指令即可高效分派——该指令将栈指针偏移量与基元基地址相加，计算出目标地址。

实现采用SBCL的汇编器生成x86-64机器码。栈驻留在R8-R15寄存器中，由模块化计数器追踪当前栈顶。`NEXT`指令（负责获取下一条虚拟机指令并跳转执行）封装了分派逻辑：从字节码中读取32位偏移量，加上基地址与变体偏移量，随后执行跳转。

文章演示了`swap`、`dup`、`drop`、`add`、`sub`等基元操作及控制流（`jmp`、`call`、`ret`）。还包含了FFI代码（`enter`/`leave`），用于从Common Lisp调用虚拟机，在内存缓冲区与寄存器栈之间复制数值。

最终生成的机器码紧凑高效，数据搬运量极小，且无浪费在寄存器重排上的周期，特别适合高性能类Forth系统。

title: Sharla Boehm, the programmer whose code underpins the Internet
summary:
**Summary:**  
Sharla Boehm, a math teacher turned computer programmer, created a groundbreaking simulation in the early 1960s that laid the foundation for the modern internet. Working at the RAND Corporation during the Cold War, she was tasked with simulating Paul Baran’s vision for a decentralized communications network that could survive a nuclear attack. At the time, military communications relied on centralized phone lines and radio, which were highly vulnerable—as demonstrated by a 1961 incident where a single overheated motor nearly triggered accidental nuclear war.

Boehm’s simulation used “packet switching,” where messages were broken into small packets, each routed independently through multiple nodes. She built a “damage” subroutine to test the network’s resilience, showing it could automatically reroute packets if nodes were knocked out—a concept Baran called “hot potato routing.” This self-healing, adaptive network was an early form of what we now call machine learning.

Her work provided the proof Baran needed to convince skeptics, including AT&T, that a digital, decentralized network was viable. Despite her pivotal role, Boehm was largely forgotten in internet history. The article highlights her legacy as a brilliant programmer whose code underpins the internet’s fundamental architecture.
chinese_title: 沙尔拉·博姆——其代码支撑着互联网的程序员
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**  
数学教师转行计算机程序员的莎拉·博姆，在20世纪60年代初创建了一项开创性模拟实验，为现代互联网奠定了基石。冷战期间，她在兰德公司工作，受命模拟保罗·巴兰提出的、能在核攻击下存活的分布式通信网络愿景。当时军用通信依赖集中式电话线和无线电，极易受攻击——1961年一次单电机过热险些引发意外核战争的事件便证明了这一点。  

博姆的模拟采用了“分组交换”技术：将信息拆解为小型数据包，每个数据包独立通过多个节点传输。她编写了“损伤”子程序测试网络弹性，证明即使部分节点失效，系统也能自动重新路由数据包——巴兰将这一概念称为“热土豆路由”。这种具备自愈与自适应能力的网络，正是如今机器学习概念的早期雏形。  

她的研究为巴兰提供了说服质疑者（包括AT&T）所需证据，证明数字化分布式网络的可行性。尽管作用关键，博姆却在互联网史中几乎被遗忘。本文强调其作为杰出程序员的遗产：她的代码支撑着互联网最底层的架构。

title: Saying Goodbye to Asm.js
summary:
**Summary:** Mozilla announces the deprecation of asm.js in Firefox 148, with plans to fully remove the code in a future release. asm.js will continue to run as regular JavaScript through the JIT, but the dedicated optimization path (OdinMonkey) is disabled by default.

**Key points:**
- asm.js was Mozilla’s 2013 innovation to run native-speed C/C++ code on the web using a strict JavaScript subset, enabling projects like Unity and Unreal to port to the web.
- It paved the way for WebAssembly (shipped in Firefox 52) and is now largely obsolete.
- WebAssembly is faster, produces smaller binaries, and requires less maintenance, while asm.js adds attack surface and upkeep costs.
- The article metaphorically frames OdinMonkey’s removal as “Ragnarök,” with WebAssembly compilers BaldrMonkey and RabaldrMonkey taking over.
- Recommendation: developers should recompile asm.js content to WebAssembly for better performance and smaller file size.
chinese_title: 告别Asm.js
chinese_summary:
**摘要：** Mozilla 宣布将在 Firefox 148 中弃用 asm.js，并计划在未来的版本中完全移除相关代码。asm.js 将继续通过 JIT 作为常规 JavaScript 运行，但专用优化路径（OdinMonkey）将默认禁用。

**关键点：**
- asm.js 是 Mozilla 于 2013 年推出的创新，利用严格的 JavaScript 子集在网页上运行原生速度的 C/C++ 代码，使 Unity 和 Unreal 等项目能够移植到网页端。
- 它为 WebAssembly（随 Firefox 52 发布）铺平了道路，如今已基本过时。
- WebAssembly 速度更快、生成的二进制文件更小，且维护需求更低，而 asm.js 增加了攻击面和维护成本。
- 文章用隐喻将 OdinMonkey 的移除比喻为“诸神黄昏”，由 WebAssembly 编译器 BaldrMonkey 和 RabaldrMonkey 接替。
- 建议：开发者应将 asm.js 内容重新编译为 WebAssembly，以获得更优性能和更小的文件体积。

title: Incident Report: May 19, 2026 – GCP Account Suspension
summary:
**Summary:** On May 19, 2026, Railway experienced an 8-hour platform-wide outage after Google Cloud incorrectly suspended their production account. This immediately took down Railway's dashboard, API, databases, and GCP-hosted compute. While workloads on Railway Metal and AWS initially remained online, the outage cascaded as edge proxy route caches expired. Because the network control plane (hosted on GCP) populates routing tables, all workloads became unreachable once caches expired, causing 404 errors across all regions.

Recovery took roughly 8 hours (22:20 UTC to ~06:14 UTC). After account access was restored, persistent disks, compute instances, and networking each required separate restoration. During recovery, GitHub rate-limited Railway's OAuth and webhooks due to retry volume, temporarily blocking logins and builds.

Railway takes full responsibility for the architectural dependency that allowed one vendor action to cause a platform-wide failure. Preventative measures include: removing the hard dependency of workload discoverability on the GCP-hosted control plane to create a true mesh network; extending high-availability database shards across AWS and Metal; and planning to remove GCP from the data plane's hot path, keeping it only for failover. Railway states it ultimately owns its vendor choices and customer uptime responsibility.
chinese_title: 事故报告：2026年5月19日——GCP账户暂停
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**2026年5月19日，Railway因谷歌云错误暂停其生产账户，导致整个平台中断8小时。此次事故立即造成Railway的控制面板、API、数据库及GCP托管计算服务瘫痪。虽然Railway Metal和AWS上的工作负载最初保持在线，但随着边缘代理路由缓存过期，故障逐步蔓延。由于网络控制平面（托管于GCP）负责填充路由表，缓存过期后所有工作负载均无法访问，导致所有区域出现404错误。

恢复耗时约8小时（UTC时间22:20至次日06:14）。账户访问权限恢复后，持久磁盘、计算实例及网络连接需分别单独修复。恢复过程中，GitHub因重试流量激增对Railway的OAuth及网络钩子实施了速率限制，暂时阻塞了登录和构建功能。

Railway对这一架构依赖承担全部责任——单一供应商的操作即导致平台级故障。预防措施包括：移除工作负载发现机制对GCP托管控制平面的强依赖，构建真正的网状网络；将高可用数据库分片扩展至AWS和Metal；计划将GCP从数据平面核心路径中移除，仅保留其用于故障切换。Railway声明，其最终需为自身供应商选择及客户可用性责任负责。

title: Google's AI is being manipulated. The search giant is quietly fighting back
summary:
**Summary:**

The article reveals a significant vulnerability in AI chatbots like Google's Gemini, ChatGPT, and AI Overviews. A BBC investigation found that these tools can be easily manipulated by publishing a single, well-crafted blog post or social media post. The AI often cites this unchecked information, spreading misinformation on topics ranging from health and finance to personal credentials.

To demonstrate, the author tricked ChatGPT and Google into claiming he was a world-champion hot-dog eater. More seriously, the same technique is used by unscrupulous companies to promote biased advice or dismiss health concerns. Experts warn this "systemic" manipulation can influence decisions on voting, medical treatment, or finances.

In response, Google has updated its spam policies to explicitly prohibit attempts to manipulate AI responses, threatening to downrank or remove offending websites. While Google insists this is merely a clarification, experts note subtle changes: AI tools are beginning to remove self-promoting names from citations, add caveats about low confidence, and recommend third-party reviews. However, critics describe the effort as "whack-a-mole," as manipulators are already shifting tactics—for example, paying YouTube influencers, which Google's AI now cites.

The article concludes that until better systems are in place, users should remain skeptical and remember that AI confidently provides a single answer, whether accurate or not. The core message: do not assume AI-generated answers are trustworthy.
chinese_title: 谷歌的人工智能正被操控。这家搜索巨头正悄然反击。
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**

本文揭示了谷歌Gemini、ChatGPT及AI Overviews等人工智能聊天机器人存在的一个重大安全隐患。英国广播公司的一项调查发现，只需发布一篇精心设计的博客文章或社交媒体帖子，就能轻易操纵这些工具。人工智能常常会引用这些未经核查的信息，从而在健康、金融乃至个人资质等议题上传播不实内容。

为进行演示，作者成功诱导ChatGPT和谷歌宣称自己是世界冠军级热狗大胃王。更严重的是，一些无良公司正利用同一手法推销带有偏见的建议，或淡化健康隐患。专家警告，这种“系统性”操纵可能影响人们在投票、医疗或财务等方面的决策。

作为回应，谷歌已更新其垃圾内容政策，明确禁止试图操纵人工智能回复的行为，并威胁将降低违规网站排名或将其移除。尽管谷歌坚称这仅是政策澄清，但专家注意到微妙变化：人工智能工具开始从引用中删除自我推销的名称，添加关于低可信度的警告，并推荐第三方评价。然而，批评者形容此举如同“打地鼠”游戏，因为操纵者已在转变策略——例如，付费给YouTube网红，而谷歌的人工智能如今会引用他们的内容。

文章总结道，在更完善的系统建立之前，用户应保持怀疑态度，并牢记人工智能会自信地给出唯一答案，无论其准确与否。核心信息是：切勿轻信人工智能生成的内容。

title: Meta blocks human rights accounts from reaching audiences in Saudi Arabia, UAE
summary:
**Summary:**

Published on May 20, 2026, the article reports that Meta has geo-blocked Facebook and Instagram accounts of independent NGOs, researchers, and human rights defenders in Saudi Arabia and the UAE, effectively preventing their content from reaching local audiences. Affected parties include ALQST for Human Rights, Democratic Diwan, and activists like Abdullah Alaoudh. Meta cited compliance with local cybercrime laws and government requests.

The signatories—a coalition of human rights and digital rights organizations—condemn this as arbitrary, discriminatory, and a violation of freedom of expression. They note that since March 2026, over 100 accounts have been restricted, following a similar pattern on X (formerly Twitter). The article highlights that both Gulf states routinely use cybercrime laws to silence dissent, especially since US/Israel strikes on Iran in February 2026.

Meta claims to have conducted human rights due diligence before complying, but the signatories demand transparency, asking how restricting a human rights group at a repressive government's request aligns with Meta’s stated commitments. They call on Meta to publish the legal requests and human rights assessments, restore all accounts, notify users with specifics, and explain the role of its Gulf offices. The piece underscores the tension between corporate compliance and corporate human rights responsibilities under the UN Guiding Principles.
chinese_title: Meta阻止人权账号向沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋的受众发布内容
chinese_summary:
**概要：**

2026年5月20日发布的报道称，Meta已对沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋的独立非政府组织、研究人员及人权捍卫者的脸书和Instagram账户实施地理封锁，有效阻止其内容触及当地受众。受影响方包括ALQST人权组织、民主迪万以及阿卜杜拉·阿劳德等活动人士。Meta称此举是出于遵守当地网络犯罪法律及政府要求。

由人权与数字权利组织组成的签署方联盟谴责这是任意、歧视性行为，且侵犯言论自由。他们指出，自2026年3月以来，已有超过100个账户受到限制，此前X平台（原推特）也出现过类似情况。文章强调，这两个海湾国家惯用网络犯罪法律压制异见，尤其在2026年2月美国/以色列对伊朗发动打击之后。

Meta声称在合规前进行了人权尽职调查，但签署方要求透明度，质疑一个压制性政府要求限制人权组织的行为，如何与Meta宣称的承诺相符。他们呼吁Meta公布法律请求及人权评估报告，恢复所有账户，向用户告知具体信息，并解释其海湾地区办事处的作用。文章凸显了企业合规与《联合国指导原则》下企业人权责任之间的紧张关系。

title: Apparently Google hates us now
summary: The article titled "Apparently Google hates us now" presents a screenshot of an error message from X (formerly Twitter) stating that JavaScript is disabled in the browser. The message instructs the user to enable JavaScript or switch to a supported browser to continue using the platform, and provides links to the Help Center, Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, Imprint, and Ad Info. The page concludes with a copyright notice for X Corp. in 2026. The main point is that X is blocking access due to JavaScript being disabled, requiring the user to take action to proceed.
chinese_title: 显然，谷歌现在讨厌我们了。
chinese_summary: 题为“显然谷歌现在讨厌我们”的文章展示了一张来自X（原Twitter）的错误页面截图，提示浏览器中禁用了JavaScript。该信息指示用户启用JavaScript或更换受支持的浏览器以继续使用该平台，并提供了帮助中心、服务条款、隐私政策、Cookie政策、版权声明和广告信息的链接。页面底部附有X公司2026年的版权声明。核心内容为：X因用户禁用JavaScript而阻止访问，要求用户采取相应措施才能继续使用。

title: LoRA and Weight Decay (2023)
summary:
**Summary: LoRA and Weight Decay Interaction**

LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) efficiently fine-tunes large language models by training small adapter matrices (A and B) instead of all model weights. While seen as a drop-in for full fine-tuning, LoRA interacts differently with weight decay, creating a distinct optimization objective.

In standard fine-tuning, weight decay regularizes weights toward zero (W → 0). However, in LoRA, weight decay pushes A and B toward zero, which effectively biases the adapted weight matrix toward the original frozen weights (W → W_init), not toward zero. This difference persists regardless of LoRA's rank size, meaning LoRA cannot perfectly approximate full fine-tuning even with unlimited capacity.

The article notes this can be both a feature (helpful when data is scarce, keeping models close to the base) and a bug (limiting adaptation with abundant data). A fix is proposed: modifying the regularization term so the entire adapted matrix (W_init + AB) decays toward zero, requiring custom update equations for A and B. The appendix clarifies that proper weight decay requires decoupling regularization from momentum-based optimizers like Adam, using the AdamW approach.

Practitioners should account for this implicit regularization bias when using LoRA.
chinese_title: LoRA与权重衰减（2023）
chinese_summary:
**摘要：LoRA与权重衰减的相互作用**

LoRA（低秩适配）通过训练小型适配矩阵（A和B）而非全部模型权重，高效微调大型语言模型。尽管被视为全量微调的即插即用替代方案，LoRA与权重衰减的相互作用方式不同，形成了独特的优化目标。

在标准微调中，权重衰减将权重正则化趋向于零（W→0）。然而，在LoRA中，权重衰减将A和B推向零，这实际上使适配后的权重矩阵偏向于原始冻结权重（W→W_init），而非零值。无论LoRA的秩大小如何，这一差异始终存在，这意味着即使具有无限容量，LoRA也无法完美近似全量微调。

文章指出，这既可能是一个特性（在数据稀缺时有助于保持模型接近基础模型），也可能是一个缺陷（在数据充足时限制适配能力）。文章提出了一种修正方案：修改正则化项，使整个适配矩阵（W_init+AB）趋向于零衰减，这需要为A和B定制更新方程。附录澄清，正确的权重衰减需要将正则化与基于动量的优化器（如Adam）解耦，采用AdamW方法。

实践者在应用LoRA时应考虑这种隐式正则化偏差。

title: Tracking Starbucks' 'widely recyclable' cups: none ended up at recycling
summary:
A three-month investigation by Beyond Plastics tracked 53 Bluetooth-enabled trackers placed in Starbucks' single-use polypropylene (No. 5 plastic) cold cups, dropped into in-store recycling bins at 35 locations across nine states and Washington, D.C. Of the 36 trackers that returned usable data, none ended up at a recycling facility. Instead, the cups traveled to landfills, incinerators, and waste-transfer stations. Specifically, 16 cups went to landfills, nine to incinerators, eight to waste-transfer stations, and three to material recovery facilities (which sort plastic but do not recycle it).

The investigation contradicts Starbucks' public claims that its polypropylene cups are "widely recyclable," following a February 2026 announcement with WM and How2Recycle asserting that over 60% of U.S. households could recycle the cups curbside. However, the U.S. plastic recycling rate is under 6%, and few facilities recycle polypropylene. Beyond Plastics also found that many Starbucks stores in 11 states offered no recycling at all.

Starbucks, the world's largest coffee chain with over 40,000 stores, serves about 75% of its U.S. beverages in these plastic cups. The report concludes that Starbucks is misleading customers and should prioritize plastic-free, reusable alternatives instead of promoting deceptive recyclability claims.
chinese_title: 追踪星巴克“广泛可回收”杯子：无一进入回收流程
chinese_summary:
《超越塑料》组织历时三个月的调查，追踪了53枚蓝牙追踪器——它们被放置在星巴克一次性聚丙烯（5号塑料）冷饮杯中，投放到美国9个州及华盛顿特区共35家门店的店内回收箱。在返回可用数据的36枚追踪器中，没有一个最终抵达回收设施。这些杯子最终流向了填埋场、焚化炉和垃圾转运站。具体而言，16个杯子进入填埋场，9个被焚烧，8个抵达垃圾转运站，3个到达材料回收设施（这些设施仅分拣塑料而不进行回收）。

这项调查与星巴克公开宣称其聚丙烯杯具"广泛可回收"的说法相悖。该公司曾于2026年2月与WM及How2Recycle联合声明，称超过60%的美国家庭可通过路边回收系统回收这些杯子。然而，美国塑料回收率不足6%，且很少有设施回收聚丙烯材料。《超越塑料》还发现，11个州的许多星巴克门店根本不提供任何回收服务。

作为全球最大咖啡连锁品牌，星巴克拥有超过4万家门店，其美国市场约75%的饮品使用这类塑料杯供应。报告结论指出，星巴克正在误导消费者，应当优先采用无塑料的可重复使用替代方案，而非推广具有欺骗性的可回收宣传。

title: Node.js 26.0.0 (Now with Temporal)
summary:
**Node.js 26.0.0 Release Summary**

Node.js 26.0.0 (Current) has been released, with long-term support (LTS) planned for October 2026. Key highlights include:

**New Features:**
- **Temporal API** enabled by default—a modern date/time API replacing the legacy Date object.
- **V8 engine** updated to version 14.6, introducing `Map.prototype.getOrInsert()` and `Iterator.concat()`.
- **Undici** updated to version 8.0.2 for improved HTTP client performance.

**Deprecations & Removals:**
- Removed: `writeHeader()` (use `writeHead()`), legacy `_stream_*` modules, and `--experimental-transform-types`.
- Runtime deprecations: `module.register()`, and crypto deprecations DEP0203/DEP0204.
- Crypto: moved DEP0182 to End-of-Life.

**Other Notable Changes:**
- Minimum GCC raised to 13.2; Python 3.9 support dropped.
- New crypto features: raw key format support, Ed25519 context parameter, and improved error details.
- Streams now read one buffer at a time; `localStorage` returns `undefined` without a file.

The release modernizes Node.js while removing legacy APIs, encouraging developers to test compatibility with their applications.
chinese_title: Node.js 26.0.0（现已集成 Temporal）
chinese_summary:
**Node.js 26.0.0 发布摘要**

Node.js 26.0.0（最新版本）已正式发布，长期支持（LTS）计划于2026年10月开始。主要亮点包括：

**新特性：**
- **Temporal API** 现默认启用——作为替代传统Date对象的现代化日期/时间API。
- **V8引擎** 更新至14.6版本，新增`Map.prototype.getOrInsert()`和`Iterator.concat()`方法。
- **Undici** 更新至8.0.2版本，提升HTTP客户端性能。

**弃用与移除：**
- 移除：`writeHeader()`（改用`writeHead()`）、旧版`_stream_*`模块及`--experimental-transform-types`。
- 运行时弃用：`module.register()`及加密模块DEP0203/DEP0204弃用。
- 加密模块：DEP0182已进入生命周期终结阶段。

**其他重要变更：**
- GCC最低版本提升至13.2；停止支持Python 3.9。
- 新增加密功能：支持原始密钥格式、Ed25519上下文参数及改进的错误详情。
- 流处理现每次仅读取一个缓冲区；无文件时`localStorage`返回`undefined`。

此次发布在现代化Node.js的同时移除了传统API，建议开发者测试应用兼容性。

title: Everything in C is undefined behavior
summary:
This article argues that all non-trivial C and C++ code contains undefined behavior (UB), making these languages inherently unsafe and impossible to use correctly. The author, a 30-year veteran, emphasizes that UB is not merely an optimization concern—compilers assume code is valid, and UB can manifest regardless of optimization settings.

Key examples of subtle UB include:
- **Pointer alignment**: Dereferencing a misaligned pointer (e.g., via casting byte arrays to `int*`) is UB, even on forgiving architectures like x86.
- **`isxdigit()` with `char` input**: If `char` is signed and contains a value >127, it becomes negative, causing out-of-bounds array access.
- **Float-to-int conversion**: Overflow from non-finite or unrepresentable values is UB.
- **Object at address zero**: C does not guarantee that a null pointer points to address zero, and dereferencing it is UB.
- **Variadic functions**: Mismatched format specifiers (e.g., `%ld` with `uint64_t`) or passing integer `0` instead of a typed `NULL` pointer are UB.
- **Integer promotion**: Arithmetic like `a + b` promotes to `int`, surprising developers.

The author notes that even mature codebases like OpenBSD contain widespread UB, which Large Language Models (LLMs) can now reliably detect. The proposed solution: use LLMs to supervise C/C++ code for UB, as human experts are too busy and codebases too large for manual review. The author concludes that writing C/C++ in 2026 without automated UB detection should be considered irresponsible.
chinese_title: C语言中的一切都是未定义行为
chinese_summary:
本文指出，所有非平凡的C和C++代码均包含未定义行为（UB），这使得这些语言本质上不安全且无法正确使用。这位拥有30年经验的老将强调，UB不仅是优化问题——编译器假定代码有效，且无论优化设置如何，UB都可能出现。

微妙的UB典型示例包括：
- **指针对齐**：解引用未对齐的指针（例如通过将字节数组转换为`int*`）属于UB，即便在x86这类对对齐宽容的架构上也是如此。
- **`isxdigit()`与`char`输入**：若`char`类型为有符号且包含大于127的值，该值将变为负数，从而导致数组越界访问。
- **浮点数转整数**：非有限值或不可表示值的溢出属于UB。
- **地址为零的对象**：C语言不保证空指针指向零地址，解引用空指针属于UB。
- **可变参数函数**：格式说明符不匹配（如对`uint64_t`使用`%ld`）或将整数`0`而非类型化的`NULL`指针作为参数传递均属于UB。
- **整型提升**：如`a + b`这类算术运算会将操作数提升为`int`类型，令开发者意外。

作者指出，即便是OpenBSD这样成熟的代码库也普遍存在UB，而大型语言模型（LLM）如今能够可靠地检测此类问题。提出的解决方案是：使用LLM监督C/C++代码中的UB，因为人类专家过于繁忙，且代码库过于庞大，无法进行人工审查。作者总结道，在2026年编写C/C++代码时若未使用自动UB检测，应被视为不负责任的行为。

title: Formal Verification Gates for AI Coding Loops
summary:
**Summary: Formal Verification Gates for AI Coding Loops**

This article argues that structural backpressure is more critical than smarter AI models for ensuring code correctness. The author proposes replacing behavioral gates (prompts, instructions, checklists) with structural gates (compilers, type checkers, linters, test runners) that produce deterministic, machine-checkable refusals when code violates invariants.

**Key points:**

- **The problem:** Broken access control remains the #1 OWASP vulnerability because invariants rely on fallible human/model memory. AI-generated code exacerbates this.
- **The solution:** Move invariants into the code substrate via formal specifications that generate guard types. This makes violations structurally difficult to introduce accidentally.
- **Implementation:** **Shen-Backpressure** uses Shen (a typed Lisp) to write formal specs, then `shengen` lowers them into target-language guard types (Go/TypeScript/Python/Rust) with sealed constructors. Example: multi-tenant authorization requires constructing a `TenantAccess` type that proves membership—bypasses fail at compile time.
- **The loop:** A Ralph-style iterative loop runs five default gates (`shengen`, `test`, `build`, `shen tc+`, `tcb audit`) on every iteration, piping failures back as concrete context.
- **Tradeoffs:** Specs require effort; generated guard code is sacred (hand-edits rejected); bypass is theoretically possible but practically difficult.

**Thesis:** For AI coding loops, deterministic refusal surfaces (structural gates) provide better certainty than smarter models. A passing gate and green CI run gives auditors something concrete—unreliable model behavior cannot.
chinese_title: AI编码循环的形式化验证门
chinese_summary:
**摘要：面向AI编码循环的形式化验证门**

本文认为，相较于更智能的AI模型，结构性反压对于确保代码正确性更为关键。作者建议用结构性门（编译器、类型检查器、linter、测试运行器）取代行为性门（提示词、指令、清单），这些结构性门能在代码违反不变性时产生确定性的、机器可检查的拒绝信号。

**核心要点：**

- **问题：** 失效的访问控制仍是OWASP头号漏洞，因为不变性依赖于易出错的人类/模型记忆。AI生成代码加剧了这一问题。
- **解决方案：** 通过生成守卫类型的形式化规约，将不变性嵌入代码基底。这使违规行为在结构上难以被意外引入。
- **实现：** **Shen-Backpressure** 使用Shen（一种带类型的Lisp）编写形式化规约，然后`shengen`将其降级为目标语言（Go/TypeScript/Python/Rust）的守卫类型，并辅以密封构造函数。示例：多租户授权要求构造一个`TenantAccess`类型来证明成员资格——绕过操作将在编译时失败。
- **循环：** 一个Ralph风格的迭代循环在每次迭代中运行五个默认门（`shengen`、`test`、`build`、`shen tc+`、`tcb audit`），并将失败信息作为具体上下文回传。
- **权衡：** 编写规约需要投入精力；生成的守卫代码是神圣的（拒绝手动编辑）；理论上可以绕过，但实际操作困难。

**论点：** 对于AI编码循环，确定性的拒绝面（结构性门）比更智能的模型能提供更好的确定性。通过的门禁和绿色的CI运行给审计员提供了具体可靠的东西——不可靠的模型行为无法提供这一点。

title: Testing distributed systems with AI agents
summary:
**Summary of "Testing distributed systems with AI agents"**

This article presents a structured, claim-driven methodology for testing distributed and stateful systems using AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, etc.). It introduces two skill workflows delivered as SKILL.md files:

1. **Design skill** – Analyzes the system's claims (promises), generates falsifying hypotheses, and produces a structured Markdown test plan (§0–§9). For consistency-critical scenarios, it requires an abstract model (e.g., register, log), operation-history schema, named checker (e.g., linearizability), nemesis with observable landing evidence, and ambiguous-outcome handling.

2. **Execute skill** – Runs the plan, captures fault evidence, applies 9-state verdicts (PASS, FAIL, INCONCLUSIVE, etc.), and blames failures to SUT/harness/checker/environment. Outputs a findings report with confidence delta.

Key principles: test named after the claim it falsifies; coverage adequacy as a deliverable; reuse existing SUT tooling; no silent passes (every verdict cites evidence). The technique catalog draws from Jepsen/Elle, deterministic simulation, chaos injection, formal methods, and crash-recovery testing.

The install is a single copy-paste command (idempotent git clone + symlink). The repo includes real verification runs against AgentDB (Rust), an eval suite, and a full reference technique catalog. Status: early but exercised, with proven bug findings.
chinese_title: 使用AI代理测试分布式系统
chinese_summary:
**《利用AI代理测试分布式系统》摘要**

本文提出了一种结构化的、基于声明驱动的方法，使用AI编码代理（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini等）来测试分布式和有状态系统。文章介绍了两种以SKILL.md文件形式交付的技能工作流程：

1.  **设计技能**：分析系统声明（承诺），生成反证假设，并生成结构化的Markdown测试计划（§0–§9）。对于一致性关键场景，它要求包含抽象模型（如寄存器、日志）、操作历史模式、命名检查器（如线性化）、具有可观测着陆证据的克星（nemesis）以及歧义结果处理。

2.  **执行技能**：运行测试计划，捕获故障证据，应用9种状态判定（通过、失败、无结论等），并将故障归责于被测系统/测试工具/检查器/环境。输出带有置信度变化量的发现报告。

核心原则：测试以其所要反驳的声明命名；将覆盖率充分性作为可交付成果；重用现有被测系统工具；无静默通过（每个判定都引用证据）。技术目录借鉴了Jepsen/Elle、确定性模拟、混沌注入、形式化方法和崩溃恢复测试。

安装只需一个复制粘贴命令（幂等的git clone加符号链接）。该仓库包含针对AgentDB（Rust）的真实验证运行、一个评估套件以及一个完整的参考技术目录。状态：尚处于早期阶段但已得到实践，并已发现已证实的错误。

title: Stable Audio 3
summary:
**Summary of Stable Audio 3**

Stable Audio 3 is a family of fast latent diffusion models (small, medium, large) designed for variable-length audio generation and editing. Key features include:

- **Variable-length generation**: Models can generate several minutes of audio, avoiding the cost of full-length outputs for short sounds.
- **Inpainting**: Supports targeted audio editing and continuation of short recordings.
- **Novel autoencoder**: A semantic-acoustic autoencoder projects audio into a compact latent space, enabling efficient diffusion while preserving fidelity and encouraging semantic structure.
- **Adversarial post-training**: Accelerates inference and improves quality, reducing steps needed while enhancing prompt adherence.
- **Performance**: Generates music and sounds in under 2 seconds on an H200 GPU and within a few seconds on a MacBook Pro M4.
- **Training data**: Trained on licensed and Creative Commons data.
- **Open release**: Weights for small and medium models, capable of running on consumer hardware, are released along with training and inference pipelines.
chinese_title: 稳定音频 3
chinese_summary:
**Stable Audio 3 简介**

Stable Audio 3 是一系列快速潜扩散模型（小、中、大），专为可变长度音频生成与编辑而设计。主要特性包括：

- **可变长度生成**：模型可生成数分钟音频，避免为短声音生成全长输出带来的成本。
- **补全修复**：支持目标音频编辑及短录音的延续。
- **新型自编码器**：一种语义-声学自编码器，将音频投影至紧凑潜空间，在保持保真度的同时实现高效扩散，并促进语义结构。
- **对抗性后训练**：加速推理、提升质量，减少所需步骤并增强提示遵循度。
- **性能**：在H200 GPU上不到2秒即可生成音乐与声音，在MacBook Pro M4上仅需数秒。
- **训练数据**：基于授权及知识共享数据进行训练。
- **开源发布**：小模型与中模型的权重（可在消费级硬件上运行）随训练及推理流水线一同发布。

title: Handling the great code forge fragmentation
summary:
**Summary: Handling the Great Code Forge Fragmentation**

The article discusses the ongoing fragmentation of code forges as users leave GitHub for alternatives like Codeberg, self-hosted Forgejo, and GitLab. Mitchell Hashimoto’s decision with Ghostty is seen as a potential bellwether for this shift.

Key points include:

1. **Unified Activity Tracking**: The author created a Go script and Hugo module to combine contribution data from multiple forges into a single heatmap, addressing the challenge of tracking work across platforms.

2. **Trust Systems Against AI Slop**: Open-source maintainers are overwhelmed by AI-generated PRs and issues. Hashimoto’s “vouch” system tracks approved/blocked contributors via a VOUCHED.td file. The author advocates for built-in, cross-platform trust chains to ensure contributor quality and deter bots.

3. **Username Lock-In**: With a potential shift to vouching-based trust, users should secure consistent usernames across major platforms (Codeberg, GitLab, Bitbucket) to prevent impersonation.

4. **Self-Hosting**: Self-hosting Forgejo with disabled account creation offers maximum protection against spam, requiring manual registration through known admins.

5. **Mirroring to GitHub**: The author mirrors repos to GitHub for community engagement and issue tracking, manually migrating PRs to self-hosted forges as a hardening step against malicious CI actions.

The article concludes by recommending a unified activity map and securing usernames across forges, while acknowledging uncertainty about GitHub’s future.
chinese_title: 应对大型代码铸造碎片化问题
chinese_summary:
**摘要：应对代码锻造平台碎片化**

文章探讨了随着用户离开GitHub转向Codeberg、自托管Forgejo及GitLab等替代平台，代码锻造领域正持续碎片化。Mitchell Hashimoto对Ghostty项目的决策被视为这一趋势的潜在风向标。

核心要点包括：

1. **统一活动追踪**：作者创建了Go脚本与Hugo模块，将来自多个锻造平台的贡献数据整合至单一热力图，解决了跨平台工作追踪难题。

2. **抵御AI垃圾的信任体系**：开源维护者正被AI生成的PR与问题淹没。Hashimoto的“担保”系统通过VOUCHED.td文件追踪已批准/屏蔽的贡献者。作者呼吁构建内置的跨平台信任链，以确保贡献者质量并遏制机器人行为。

3. **用户名锁定**：随着信任机制向担保制转变，用户应在主要平台（Codeberg、GitLab、Bitbucket）统一注册用户名，防止身份盗用。

4. **自托管**：通过禁用账户注册功能自托管Forgejo，并要求已知管理员手动审批注册，可最大限度抵御垃圾信息。

5. **镜像至GitHub**：作者将仓库镜像至GitHub以维持社区互动与问题追踪，同时手动将PR迁移至自托管锻造平台，以此作为抵御恶意CI操作的加固措施。

文章结论建议采用统一活动图谱并跨平台锁定用户名，同时承认GitHub未来走向尚存不确定性。

title: When Fast Fourier Transform Meets Transformer for Image Restoration (2024)
summary:
**Summary:**

This paper, accepted at ECCV 2024, introduces SFHformer, an image restoration framework that integrates Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) into the Transformer architecture. The core innovation is a dual-domain hybrid structure: the spatial domain handles local modeling, while the frequency domain enables efficient global modeling via FFT. Unique positional coding and frequency dynamic convolution are designed for each frequency component to extract rich features.

The proposed method operates on the premise that image degradation can be understood from a frequency perspective, offering a universal solution for diverse restoration tasks. Extensive experiments across **ten restoration tasks**—including deraining, dehazing, deblurring, desnowing, denoising, super-resolution, and underwater/low-light enhancement—on **thirty-one datasets** demonstrate that SFHformer outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches. Notably, it achieves a favorable balance between performance, parameter size, and computational cost. The paper also provides open-source code, pre-trained weights, and visual results for various datasets. A subsequent extension, SWFormer, explores multi-domain learning.
chinese_title: 《当快速傅里叶变换遇见Transformer：图像复原新方法（2024）》
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**

本文发表于ECCV 2024，提出了一种将快速傅里叶变换（FFT）集成到Transformer架构中的图像复原框架SFHformer。其核心创新在于双域混合结构：空间域负责局部建模，而频率域通过FFT实现高效的全局建模。针对不同频率分量设计了独特的定位编码与频率动态卷积，以提取丰富特征。

该方法基于图像退化可从频率角度理解的假设，为多种复原任务提供了通用解决方案。在涵盖**去雨、去雾、去模糊、去雪、去噪、超分辨率以及水下/低光照增强**等**十项复原任务**、涉及**三十一个数据集**的大量实验中，SFHformer的性能均优于现有最先进方法。值得注意的是，它在性能、参数量和计算成本之间取得了良好平衡。此外，论文还提供了开源代码、预训练权重以及多个数据集的可视化结果。后续扩展SWFormer进一步探索了多领域学习。

title: Tennessee man jailed 37 days for Trump meme wins settlement after lawsuit
summary:
**Summary:**

Retired law enforcement officer Larry Bushart was jailed for 37 days in Perry County, Tennessee, after sharing a meme that accurately quoted Donald Trump’s post-school shooting statement: “We have to get over it.” The meme referenced a 2024 school shooting in Iowa, but Sheriff Nick Weems obtained an arrest warrant claiming it threatened a local Tennessee high school—despite knowing the meme originated from a different state.

Bushart was held on a $2 million bond, lost his post-retirement job, missed his anniversary, and the birth of his grandchild. He was released only after his case went viral. Represented by the Foundation for Individual Rights and Expression (FIRE), Bushart filed a federal civil rights lawsuit for retaliation against protected speech.

On May 20, 2026, the parties announced a $835,000 settlement. Bushart said his First Amendment rights were vindicated. FIRE attorneys emphasized that police cannot jail people over harmless political memes and that the settlement should deter similar abuses. The case is part of a broader pattern of censorship following the assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk.
chinese_title: 田纳西州男子因特朗普表情包被监禁37天，诉讼后获和解赔偿
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**

退休执法人员拉里·布沙特因转发一则准确引用唐纳德·特朗普校园枪击后言论“我们必须挺过去”的迷因，在田纳西州佩里县被监禁37天。该迷因提及2024年爱荷华州一起校园枪击案，但警长尼克·威姆斯明知该迷因源自其他州，仍取得逮捕令，声称其威胁了当地一所田纳西高中。

布沙特被以200万美元保释金关押，失去了退休后工作、错过了结婚纪念日及孙辈出生。直到案件在网络上引发广泛关注后才获释。由个人权利与表达基金会代理，布沙特提起联邦民权诉讼，指控其因受保护言论遭报复。

2026年5月20日，双方宣布达成83.5万美元和解。布沙特称其第一修正案权利得到伸张。基金会律师强调，警方不能因无害政治迷因监禁他人，此和解应能震慑类似滥用职权行为。该案是保守派活动人士查理·柯克遭刺杀后更广泛审查模式的一部分。

title: Japan is gripped by mass allergies. A 1950s project is to blame
summary:
Japan is experiencing a severe national hay fever crisis, with 43% of the population suffering from pollen allergies, primarily caused by Japanese cedar (sugi) and cypress (hinoki) trees. The root cause dates back to the 1950s, when post-war deforestation led the government to rapidly reforest vast areas with just these two fast-growing species. Today, these monoculture plantations cover 20% of Japan’s land, releasing massive amounts of pollen that trigger allergies. The economic impact is estimated at $1.6 billion per day due to sick days and reduced spending.

In response, Japan declared allergies a national social problem in 2023, aiming to reduce high-pollen sugi forests by 20% by 2033 and overall pollen by 50% in 30 years. However, replacing these forests is a massive challenge. Some local projects, such as in Kobe and Nishiawakura, are successfully restoring biodiverse broadleaf forests, which also help prevent landslides and support wildlife. Japan is also investing in pollen forecasting, low-pollen tree seedlings, new medicines, and a forest environment tax to fund sustainable forestry.

Climate change is worsening the problem, causing earlier pollen dispersal. While sugi plantations store significant carbon, aging trees absorb less, necessitating replanting with diverse species to maintain carbon sinks. Critics warn that focusing only on allergies risks neglecting broader ecological health, urging long-term planning for biodiversity and climate resilience.
chinese_title: 日本正被大规模过敏所困扰。20世纪50年代的一项工程是罪魁祸首。
chinese_summary:
日本正面临严重的国民花粉症危机，43%的人口患有花粉过敏症，主要致病原因为日本柳杉和扁柏。这场危机的根源可追溯至20世纪50年代：战后滥伐导致政府为快速恢复植被，大规模种植这两种速生树种。如今，单一树种人工林占日本国土面积的20%，释放出大量引发过敏的花粉。据估算，因病假和消费减少造成的经济损失每日高达16亿美元。

为此，日本在2023年将花粉过敏症列为全国性社会问题，计划在2033年前将高花粉柳杉林减少20%，并在30年内将花粉总量降低50%。然而，改造这些森林面临巨大挑战。神户、西粟仓等地的地方项目已成功恢复生物多样性丰富的阔叶林，这些森林还能有效防止山体滑坡并维持野生动植物栖息。日本同时投入资金开发花粉预报、低花粉树苗、新型药物，并开征森林环境税以支持可持续林业。

气候变化导致花粉传播期提前，进一步加剧问题。尽管柳杉人工林储存了可观碳量，但老龄树木吸碳能力下降，亟需以多样性树种进行再造林以维持碳汇功能。批评者警告，若仅聚焦过敏问题而忽视整体生态健康，需制定兼顾生物多样性与气候适应性的长期规划。

title: Autoregressive next token prediction and KV Cache in transformers
summary:
**Summary:**

This article explains the mechanism of autoregressive next-token prediction in transformer models and the role of the Key-Value (KV) Cache in optimizing inference.

**Key Points:**
- **Autoregressive Generation:** Transformers generate text one token at a time, where each new token depends on all previously generated tokens. This sequential process is computationally expensive.
- **Problem with Standard Attention:** In a naive implementation, for each new token, the model re-computes attention over the entire past sequence, leading to redundant calculations and quadratic time complexity relative to sequence length.
- **KV Cache Solution:** The KV Cache stores the Key and Value matrices from previous attention computations. For each new token, only its Query, Key, and Value are computed. The new Key and Value are appended to the cache, and attention is calculated using the cached (past) Keys and Values plus the new ones.
- **Benefits:** This reduces per-step time complexity from O(n²) to O(n) (linear in sequence length), dramatically speeding up inference by eliminating redundant recomputation.
- **Trade-off:** The KV Cache increases memory usage linearly with batch size, sequence length, number of layers, and model dimension. For long contexts or large models, this can become a bottleneck, often mitigated by techniques like KV cache quantization or offloading.

**Conclusion:** The KV Cache is a critical optimization for efficient transformer inference, enabling fast autoregressive generation at the cost of increased memory overhead.
chinese_title: Transformer中的自回归下一词元预测与KV缓存
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**

本文阐释了Transformer模型中自回归下一个词元预测的机制，以及键值缓存（KV Cache）在优化推理过程中的作用。

**要点：**
- **自回归生成：** Transformer模型逐个生成词元，每个新词元依赖之前生成的所有词元，这一顺序过程计算成本高昂。
- **标准注意力机制的问题：** 在朴素实现中，每生成一个新词元，模型都要对整个历史序列重新计算注意力，导致冗余计算，且时间复杂度与序列长度呈平方关系。
- **键值缓存解决方案：** KV缓存存储了先前注意力计算中的键矩阵（Key）和值矩阵（Value）。对于每个新词元，仅需计算其查询（Query）、键（Key）和值（Value）。新的键和值被追加到缓存中，注意力计算则使用缓存的（过去的）键和值加上新的键值对进行。
- **优势：** 这使得每步时间复杂度从O(n²)降低到O(n)（与序列长度呈线性关系），通过消除冗余重计算，大幅加速推理过程。
- **权衡：** KV缓存会随批次大小、序列长度、层数和模型维度的增加而线性增加内存占用。对于长上下文或大模型而言，这可能成为瓶颈，通常通过KV缓存量化或卸载等技术进行缓解。

**结论：** KV缓存是实现高效Transformer推理的关键优化手段，它以增加内存开销为代价，实现了快速自回归生成。

title: Show HN: Lance – image/video generation and understanding in one model
summary:
**Summary of Lance: Unified Multimodal Model**

Lance is a 3B-parameter native unified multimodal model developed by ByteDance, designed to handle image and video understanding, generation, and editing within a single framework. Trained from scratch (except for ViT and VAE encoders) on a budget of 128 A100 GPUs, it achieves strong performance across multiple benchmarks despite its small active parameter count.

**Key Capabilities:**
- **Text-to-Image/Video generation** – High-quality outputs at 768px and up to 121 frames for video.
- **Image/Video Editing** – Supports multi-turn consistency editing and intelligent video editing.
- **Image/Video Understanding** – Performs visual question answering, reasoning, and captioning (e.g., identifying license plates, analyzing pie charts, describing video events).

**Performance Highlights:**
- Outperforms many larger models in benchmarks: top scores on GenEval (0.90 overall, equal to TUNA-7B), competitive DPG-Bench (84.67), and leads VBench video generation (85.11 total score).
- GEdit-Bench image editing score of 7.30, surpassing most unified models.

**Technical Notes:**
- Uses a staged multi-task training recipe.
- Recommended hardware: GPU with ≥40GB VRAM; compatible with CUDA 12.4+.
- Open-source: model weights available on Hugging Face, with Gradio demo and task-specific inference scripts.
chinese_title: Show HN：Lance – 图像/视频生成与理解融合于单一模型
chinese_summary:
**Lance：统一多模态模型简介**

Lance是字节跳动开发的30亿参数原生统一多模态模型，能够在单一框架内处理图像与视频的理解、生成与编辑任务。该模型（除ViT和VAE编码器外）在128块A100 GPU预算下从头训练而成，尽管活跃参数量较小，但在多个基准测试中展现出强劲性能。

**核心能力：**
- **文本到图像/视频生成**——输出768px分辨率的高质量图像，以及最长121帧的视频。
- **图像/视频编辑**——支持多轮一致性编辑与智能视频编辑。
- **图像/视频理解**——执行视觉问答、推理与描述（例如车牌识别、饼图分析、视频事件描述）。

**性能亮点：**
- 在多项基准测试中超越众多更大规模模型：GenEval总分0.90（与TUNA-7B持平），DPG-Bench评分84.67，VBench视频生成总分85.11领跑。
- GEdit-Bench图像编辑评分7.30，超越多数统一模型。

**技术要点：**
- 采用分阶段多任务训练方案。
- 推荐硬件：显存≥40GB的GPU；兼容CUDA 12.4+。
- 开源：模型权重已发布于Hugging Face，提供Gradio演示界面及任务专用推理脚本。

title: Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment
summary:
**Summary:**

A European payment alliance is set to challenge Visa and Mastercard, uniting five national systems: France’s Wero, Spain’s Bizum, Italy’s Bancomat, Portugal’s MB WAY, and Nordic Vipps MobilePay. Together, they represent **130 million active users** across 13 countries, forming a sovereign alternative that processes billions of transactions without data passing through US servers.

The project creates a central interoperability hub, managed by a joint entity launching in the first half of 2026. This hub will allow seamless cross-border payments between national systems—for example, a French Wero user sending money to a Spanish Bizum user as easily as a domestic transfer.

**Deployment timeline:** person-to-person transfers across all 13 countries begin in 2026; online and in-store payments follow in 2027. The coalition will eventually cover **72% of the EU and Norway’s population**.

The EuroPA alliance (Spain, Portugal, Italy, Andorra), operational since March 2025, serves as a prototype. It processed €6 million in one year without advertising, signaling strong potential.

The initiative aims to end Europe’s reliance on non-continental giants, a priority highlighted by ECB President Christine Lagarde in April 2025.
chinese_title: 再见，Visa和万事达：1.3亿欧洲人转向主权支付系统
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**

欧洲支付联盟将挑战Visa和万事达，由五大国家系统联合组成：法国的Wero、西班牙的Bizum、意大利的Bancomat、葡萄牙的MB WAY以及北欧的Vipps MobilePay。它们共同代表13个国家的**1.3亿活跃用户**，构建了一个无需数据经过美国服务器即可处理数十亿笔交易的主权替代方案。

该项目将创建一个中央互操作枢纽，由将于2026年上半年成立的合资企业管理。该枢纽将实现国家系统之间的无缝跨境支付——例如，法国Wero用户向西班牙Bizum用户转账，如同国内转账一样便捷。

**部署时间表：** 2026年，13个国家之间的个人对个人转账启动；2027年，在线和店内支付跟进。该联盟最终将覆盖**72%的欧盟和挪威人口**。

自2025年3月起运营的EuroPA联盟（西班牙、葡萄牙、意大利、安道尔）作为原型，在未做广告的情况下一年内处理了600万欧元交易，显示出巨大潜力。

该计划旨在结束欧洲对非欧洲大陆巨头的依赖，这一优先事项由欧洲央行行长克里斯蒂娜·拉加德于2025年4月强调。
